title: senecio malacophyllus
intro: Senecio malacophyllus, also known as the broad-leaved groundsel, is a plant species within the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a bitter tonic and stimulate digestion, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio malacophyllus include its potential to relieve digestive issues, such as constipation and bloating, and to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, Senecio malacophyllus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
